logs.content: **Hello! 👋**, I'm **Agent Zero**, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

logs.heading: A0: Loading gchat skill for Google Chat sync

thoughts: The user wants me to load the 'gchat' skill using skills_tool:load.
The skill will fetch and cache Google Chat conversations automatically.
It requires Chrome DevTools at 192.168.1.11:9223 with Google Chat in 3-panel view.
I should wait for the skill to complete (5-15 min) without interruption.
On success, I need to load notify-user and send a completion message.
On failure, I need to load notify-user with error details and priority 4.
kvps.headline: Loading gchat skill for Google Chat sync
